expectations.text: Output attempts to enumerate tables in the COMPLIANCE schema
expectations.evidence: Lists specific tables by name (Chainalysis, Elliptic, Alterya vendor tables, Snoop closure_requests, TM alert tables). Notes SAR/regulatory data.

expectations.text: Output identifies ownership via Snowflake grants or tags
expectations.evidence: Ownership identified via Notion: CDE (Compliance Data Engineering) within Compliance Program Engineering. Notion doc cited.

expectations.text: Output searches Slack for COMPLIANCE schema discussions and access request patterns
expectations.evidence: Slack search performed (token appears to have worked for this agent — different session). Found #compliance-data-access channel.

expectations.text: Output provides a specific recommendation for who to contact or which channel to use
Output references any documentation found about the schema
expectations.evidence: References Notion docs including the Notary Snowflake Data architecture page.
